# Bansko Concierge

> Owner care and discreet, buyer-side property advisory in Bulgaria and Northern Greece — for international owners, buyers and private investors from the DACH region, Israel and beyond. Two things carry the work: looking after property year-round for owners who are not there, and representing the buyer when someone acquires at the upper end. We do not publish listings. Verified-first: mandate and readiness of funds before confidential detail is opened. We represent the buyer, work alongside licensed local partners, and stay out of your client relationship.

Bansko Concierge (banskoconcierge.com) helps international clients own without friction and buy well in Bulgaria and Northern Greece. Selected Balkan markets are covered through established local partners rather than an own desk. Our core is Owner Care: reliable local presence for owners who cannot be on site. Around it sits buyer-side advisory, technical verification, relocation and on-the-ground coordination. We run no shop window — there is no public list of properties for sale; when an owner sells, it happens quietly and on the owner's terms. Positioning for the euro era: EU stability, capital security and preservation of value rather than yield promises. Our posture is quiet, selective and evidence-based — never a hard sell.

## Buyer & owner services
- [BC Private Markets](https://banskoconcierge.com/private-markets/): Independent buy-side advisory and curated access to off-market prime property in Bulgaria and Northern Greece; selected Balkan markets are covered through established local partners rather than an own desk. Verified-first (mandate and readiness of funds before confidential detail is opened), engineer-led due diligence, disclosed economics. We represent the buyer; the regulated brokerage role, where required, sits with licensed local partners.
- [Investor Support](https://banskoconcierge.com/investor-support): Independent, engineer-led buyer orientation for people exploring the Bulgarian and Balkan market — condition, real local costs and market reality before you commit. Orientation only: no representation, no transaction role, no brokerage. For an active buy-side mandate and off-market access, see BC Private Markets.
- [Owner Care Bulgaria](https://banskoconcierge.com/owner-care-bulgaria): The core of what we do. Ongoing local care for international owners — property oversight, maintenance coordination, key handling and everything that must happen on site. Because we hold a property's condition history over years, an owner who later decides to sell starts from a truthful picture rather than a listing photograph. Selling is never advertised here; it happens from the owner, on the owner's terms. On any one property we act for the seller or for a buyer — never both on the same transaction, and the arrangement is disclosed.
- [Property Risk Check Bulgaria](https://banskoconcierge.com/property-risk-check-bulgaria): An independent pre-decision check of a property and its risks before you commit.
- [Relocation & Orientation Bulgaria](https://banskoconcierge.com/relocation-bulgaria-orientation): Practical relocation and orientation support for moving to or settling in Bulgaria.
- [Local Support](https://banskoconcierge.com/local-support): On-the-ground assistance and coordination for owners and buyers.

## Regions served
Core market 2026–27: Bulgaria (home market: Bansko/Razlog) and Northern Greece. Selected Balkan markets — Serbia, Romania, Montenegro, Croatia, North Macedonia, Albania — are covered through established local partners, not an own desk; the country pages at banskoconcierge.com give regional context.

## Concierge (for owners and their guests)
Private dining and private chef, private mobility and chauffeur, and curated outdoor experiences. These support owners and their guests; they are not a separate business line.

## Company & contact
- Owner care and buyer-side advisory. Verified-first: mandate and readiness of funds before confidential detail is opened.
- We publish no listings. We work alongside licensed local partners on standard terms and stay out of your client relationship.
- Contact: hello@banskoconcierge.com · +359 89 576 27 85 · banskoconcierge.com

## Knowledge
- [Blog](https://banskoconcierge.com/blog): Buying property in Bulgaria and the Balkans, investment context, relocation and the region.
